case_title: EVAN BRAND VS. NEW HOME CONSTRUCTION INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAND, EVAN AS TO DEFENDANT NEW HOME CONSTRUCTION INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAND, EVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW HOME CONSTRUCTION INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,569.20 PRINCIPAL, $7.89 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,757.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BRAND, EVAN
